title: Crispy White Delight Fritters
description: A simple and tasty snack recipe made with crispy white delight and savory fry.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine white delight and fry.
2. Add water and mix until a smooth batter forms.
3. Heat a non-stick pan or deep fryer to 350°F (180°C).
4. Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the batter into the hot oil.
5. Cook for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Remove from oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
